title: Board to Globe View needs to support KMZ files
excerpt: I would like the ability to use/link KMZ files with this Board to Globe view so each data point in my table would have an associated polygon with it on the globe, not just an address.

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to use/link KMZ files with this Board to Globe view so each data point in my table would have an associated polygon with it on the globe, not just an address.

posts.author: KodiakMoon (EdmundDavis)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this would be very useful for our business as well. We would like to have the ability to drag and drop kmz files to the maps and have them save to an item/project. Also if we could upload kmz to the address section that would auto map the kmz just as it does for addresses.
